title: paeonia peregrina var. leiocarpa
intro: Paeonia peregrina var. leiocarpa, also known as the Chinese Peony or White Peony, is a plant species within the Paeoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, offering various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Paeonia peregrina var. leiocarpa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's roots or flowers in hot water.
